props.ChoiceText: Not all household wars happen upstairs; some begin in the hall and spread through routines, keys, and whispered loyalties.
props.ChoiceBio: A rival in the servants hall taught you that command below stairs is never merely formal.

0.TargetText: One faction in service still counts itself yours.
0.TransitionText: Because a rival in the servants hall taught you that command below stairs is never merely formal, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.
